productName.description: Full product name displayed in the sidebar and UI.

productNameShort.description: Short product name for space-constrained contexts.

favicon.description: Path to the favicon relative to public/. Must start with '/'.

accentColor.description: Primary accent colors for light and dark themes.

notificationPrefix.description: Prefix used in browser notification titles.

daemonName.description: Name of the daemon/CLI process (used in auth error hints).

clientName.description: Client name sent in API handshakes.

filePrefix.description: Prefix used in file names (e.g. debug log downloads).

loginHint.description: English hint shown when the daemon doesn't support login.

loginHintZh.description: Chinese hint shown when the daemon doesn't support login.

type.description: Logo type. 'kimi-eyes' uses the built-in Kimi eyes SVG (recolored); 'custom-svg' reads a custom SVG from a URL; 'custom-image' uses a tag.

src.description: Path to the logo file (required for custom-svg and custom-image).
